description.value: Aura moderate enchantment; CL 6th; Slot head; Weight 3 lbs.; Price 3,500 gp DESCRIPTION A maiden’s helm appears as a distinctive plate and plumed helm. The helm imparts enhanced power and gravitas to the wearer’s voice, granting a +5 competence bonus on Intimidate checks. The wearer of a maiden’s helm can use command three times per day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, cause fear, command; Cost 1,750 gp
